rationale_en: A single earmarked reconstruction-tax amendment is one of many minor tax instruments, too small on its own to move aggregate tax revenue.
A mid-year top-up budget directly adjusts that year's fiscal totals but is a secondary instrument to the primary annual budget law.
A single state-guaranteed loan to one airline is too narrow and small to be expected to move a national air-passenger traffic series.
A mid-year top-up budget directly adjusts that year's fiscal totals but is a secondary instrument to the primary annual budget law.
This is the foundational law restructuring Iran's entire social-security architecture, a major structural instrument for this domain.
The chart's 1991-2006 window mostly predates this 2004 law's enactment and implementation, so there is no plausible channel to the data shown.
The primary annual budget law directly sets that year's government revenue and expenditure, a major fiscal instrument for this domain.
One year's routine budget is a small force against Iran's overall GDP trajectory.
This is Iran's principal legal instrument explicitly targeting tobacco use and advertising, a major channel directly aimed at this exact measure.
It is part of the regulatory backdrop, but the post-2012 market structure this chart tracks was shaped mainly by privatization, not this control law.
Authorizing utilization of two power plants is a real but incremental addition to national generation capacity, one of many such additions over the decades.
The primary wartime annual budget law directly set that year's government revenue and expenditure, a major fiscal instrument for this domain.
One year's wartime budget is a small force against Iran's overall GDP trajectory, even amid heavy military spending.
Wartime deficit spending financed through central-bank credit is a recognized but partial channel into inflation, one force among several alongside the war economy and price controls.
A narrow payroll-cost exemption for micro-firms is one of many small labor-market instruments, unlikely to visibly move aggregate labor-market series.
The premium exemption's effect on SSO funding is diffuse and too small to be expected to move pensioner payment totals.
The proposed surcharge was rejected and never took effect, so it had no expected effect on trade-tax or import series.
This is a procedural rule governing land-purchase mechanics, not land supply or housing construction, so no expected effect on these aggregate stock series.
A single $4 million loan to one joint-venture oil company is negligible against Iran's national crude-oil output.
Annulling one implementing provision of the subsidy law is a narrow judicial correction to the machinery, not a scale change to aggregate subsidy transfers.
This compensates farmers after drought rather than altering growing conditions, so its expected effect on wheat output is marginal compared to weather itself.
This is a narrow, drought-triggered compensation scheme, not a structural pillar of the social-protection system.
This law sets rent levels and ceilings; it has no expected channel to the number of housing units this chart actually counts.
The 1974 law postdates this 1965-1971 expenditure data entirely, so it cannot have affected the figures shown.
A targeted anti-closure support law is a real but partial force in industrial development, one instrument among the era's broader industrialization policies.
This law regulates employment terms on farms rather than driving the level of agricultural employment, which is set mainly by broader structural shifts.
This is a narrow collateral and mortgage rule for land-reform plots, with no direct channel to land area, irrigation extent, or agricultural value added.
Extending a deadline for an existing delegated-authority provision is a procedural continuity measure, not itself a change to duty rates or trade flows.
This is a procedural fiscal-year alignment measure for banks in transition, not an instrument that changes government indebtedness to the central bank.
This is the core post-revolution legal framework governing how all mines nationwide are exploited, a major instrument for the whole mining sector.
The law governs how mines are operated, but mineral rents as a share of GDP depend mainly on global prices and royalty capture, making this at most a partial, indirect channel.
This authorizes incremental tariff adjustments under specific trade agreements, one of many such periodic changes rather than a wholesale tariff reform.
Nationalization seized Iran's dominant industry and triggered an embargo-driven collapse in output, a structural break in the national accounts.
Nationalization and the ensuing Consortium Agreement directly established Iran's negotiated revenue share, the legal basis these revenue-distribution charts measure.
Nationalization triggered the 1951-54 embargo-driven collapse in oil output and the subsequent long expansion, a structural break in the production series.
As the legal act that reshaped control over Iran's dominant export good, nationalization had a major expected effect on goods-export and fuel-export-share trajectories.

This capital-injection measure supported a banking system already reorganized by nationalization, one contributing factor among several to these financial-depth ratios, not the structural driver itself.
Adopting the internationally harmonized tariff-classification system directly resets how duties are calculated on imports, a real but partial force among the determinants of trade-tax revenue.
One year's wartime budget-credit top-up is a small force against Iran's overall GDP trajectory.
This law directly finances war costs during the Iran-Iraq war, a major and direct channel into that period's military-expenditure series.
As a law restoring war-cost budget credits, it makes a real but partial addition to one year's total government expense within a long series.
A tariff bylaw for one narrow machinery category is too small to move an all-products average tariff rate or the manufacturing value-added mix.
These are execution and disbursement rules for an already-enacted budget, not the law that sets the totals, so their expected effect on the totals themselves is limited.
This support scheme for centralized weaving complexes is a real but narrow instrument against the handwoven-carpet sector's broader decline from global competition and sanctions.
A single fiscal year's subsidized-credit employment scheme is too narrow to move national employment headcounts by sector or gender.
A single fiscal year's subsidized-credit employment scheme is too narrow to move national employment headcounts by sector or gender.
This sets disclosure and reporting requirements, a procedural transparency measure, not an instrument that changes the size of the insurance market itself.
This financing mechanism for renovating worn-out urban areas is one housing program among several, a real but partial force on national housing stock and tenure.
This amends two specific clauses of the trade-regulation bylaw, a narrow procedural update to licensing detail rather than a broad change to trade policy.
Bringing the large informal credit market under oversight has a real but partial and gradual effect on measured monetary aggregates, mixing genuine and definitional channels.
As a national-scale but partial regulatory measure, its effect is diffuse across these broad categories rather than a dominant driver of any one.

This is a core mechanism of the Article 44 privatization program that listed large state-owned firms on the Tehran Stock Exchange, a major and well-documented channel into market capitalization and trading volume.

As part of the Article 44 privatization program's implementing machinery, this amendment shares in that reform's broad economic reach, though as a narrower bylaw amendment its own marginal effect on GDP and investment is more partial.

This bylaw implements the energy-pattern reform whose explicit target is exactly what these charts measure, though as an implementing regulation its actual enforcement determines how large the effect really is, a real but partial channel.
This governs execution mechanics for public accounting, a procedural implementation detail rather than an instrument that changes actual government revenue or expenditure.
This circular only decides which existing exchange rate is used for customs valuation; it does not itself set or move the exchange rate.
Changing the customs valuation basis affects reported dutiable import values at the margin, a real but narrow effect on the aggregate merchandise import figures.
A ruling on a single construction input's price-setting authority is far too narrow to be expected to move a general price index.
This concerns a narrow fee dispute for importers, a procedural correction rather than a change to trade volumes or tariff policy.
This ruling concerns income-tax treatment of book-recorded share values, not the actual trading volume or market capitalization these charts track.
Annulling this one circular removed a specific, narrow revenue channel, a real but marginal effect on the aggregate income and capital-gains tax revenue series.
This concerns one working group's administrative minutes, a negligible and non-specific connection to a general price index.
Fee levels on branch openings are one marginal cost factor among many broader drivers of bank branch expansion strategy.
A duty ruling on one narrow product category is negligible against Iran's aggregate import figures.
Strengthening the institution that develops industrial parks is a real but indirect contributor to provincial industrial distribution, one factor among many shaping where industry locates.
A customs exemption on machinery imports is a cost-reduction incentive, one of many small forces shaping agricultural productivity rather than a dominant driver.
This annual budget is a real fiscal instrument whose reach varies sharply by measure, from directly setting that year's Expense to being only a small force against overall GDP.
This act directly amends the annual budget law's totals, a major instrument that materially resets exactly what this chart plots for that year.
As a budget and development-plan amendment, this is one force among several shaping GDP and investment in that year, a small piece of the overall economy.
This narrow amendment redirects certain earmarked revenues to specified uses, a small piece of aggregate tax and revenue totals rather than a structural change.
A cut to cargo-handling fees is a minor administrative cost reduction, not something expected to move aggregate merchandise import volumes.
This directly amends the tax regime under which the state tobacco monopoly this chart tracks operated, a real though partial change limited to two articles.
This annual budget is a real fiscal instrument whose reach varies sharply by measure, from directly setting that year's Expense to being only a small force against overall GDP.
A customs-duty exemption for exporters is a real incentive but one force among several, including exchange rates and global demand, shaping non-oil export growth.
Amending one clause of an existing revenue-collection law is a real but small piece of aggregate government revenue, not a structural change.
This amends the official FX-allocation ceiling under the development-plan budget, a real but partial channel amid Iran's broader multi-rate exchange system dynamics.

This is the foundational law establishing Iran's universal-health-insurance framework, a major instrument directly targeted at exactly what these public and out-of-pocket health-financing measures track.
This is a narrow administrative implementing bylaw for one fee category, too small to be expected to move these broader revenue aggregates.
This is the core implementing regulation for the modern Tehran Stock Exchange's listing rules and trading infrastructure, a major instrument directly shaping these market-structure measures.
A subsidized-credit scheme for select energy-efficiency projects is one of several forces shaping the economy-wide energy-intensity trend, not the dominant driver.
This is the direct legal mechanism by which large state-owned enterprises were transferred, largely through listing on the Tehran Stock Exchange, a major channel into these market-structure measures.
As part of the Article 44 privatization program, this bylaw is a real force among several, including sanctions and oil prices, shaping GDP and investment in this period.
This is a routine amendment to trade-licensing administrative machinery, procedural rather than a substantive change to trade volumes.
This updates licensing and trade-classification detail rather than headline trade policy, a procedural correction rather than a substantive change to trade volumes.
Mehr was the state's flagship mass-housing program of the 2010s, building millions of subsidized units, a major instrument reshaping national housing tenure structure.
Directed central-bank lending to fund Mehr housing is a well-documented but partial contributor to monetary base growth, one of a few large drivers in this period.
This is cited as one contributing driver of the 2012-2013 inflation spike, but sanctions and the rial's collapse were the dominant forces that year.
A narrow update to livestock sanitary-control rules is a quarantine and certification detail, not something expected to move aggregate meat trade volumes.
This is a routine administrative customs-clearance notice for one company, procedural and too narrow to be expected to move national vehicle production.
These are two major named dam projects that directly expanded irrigated farmland and hydroelectric capacity, a real though partial contribution among many such projects over the decades.
A mid-year supplementary budget makes a real but small addition to one year's spending within a multi-decade Expense series.
This act created the company that built and still operates the mine and smelter responsible for nearly all of Iran's copper output, effectively defining the series.
The installment-sale mechanism is a real channel for selling state shares to the public via the stock exchange, one of several privatization vehicles feeding these market measures.
This bylaw regulates permitted forest exploitation, but Iran's long-run forest-area trend is driven mainly by broader land-use and enforcement dynamics, making its own effect marginal.
This premium-rate-setting regulation is a real but routine regulatory lever within the insurance sector, one of many such rules rather than a scale-changing reform.
This bylaw converted Iran's implicit energy and bread subsidies into explicit cash transfers, directly redefining what the recorded subsidies-and-transfers series captures.
The subsidy reform abruptly reset administered energy, fuel and bread prices nationwide, a well-documented direct trigger of Iran's 2010-2012 inflation acceleration.
The bylaw created the near-universal monthly cash-transfer program that is the direct source of Iran's exceptionally high social-safety-net coverage figures.
As one of the largest national-scale fiscal and price reforms in this period, the subsidy program is a real but partial force on GDP growth alongside sanctions and oil-price swings.
Cutting energy subsidies to curb waste was an explicit stated goal of the reform, a real but partial channel given documented gradual follow-through on energy-intensity reduction in practice.
